programmes.show_name: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programmes.show_description: Family-friendly musical film starring Gene Wilder and Jack Albertson, 1971. A poor but hopeful boy seeks a prize that will send him on a tour of a chocolate factory.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
St Emilion: James Martin embarks on a culinary tour around the country that inspired his career - his first stop is St Emilion, the place that inspired his passion for food.

James is back in the kitchen and cooking for Amy Dowden and Carlos Gu from Strictly Come Dancing, enjoying four pasta recipes from chef Francesco Mazzei, and learning about tomatoes with gardener David Domoney.
Jimmy and Shivi are joined by chef Paul Ainsworth, plus there's flower arranging, and close encounters with raccoons.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.

programmes.show_name: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programmes.show_description: Joining Alan this time are Tim Vine, Natalie Cassidy, runners and riders from the 2026 Windsor Horse Show and horticulturalist Camilla Bassett-Smith.
Documentary series. The family celebrate the end of winter by hosting their very first farmers market, with people buying products from local artisan makers and producers.
Alan Titchmarsh and his team reveal how to bring beauty to any size of garden while creating a stunning space in Peterlee in County Durham for a 90-year-old community hero.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
Adil Ray hosts the game of words as EastEnders royalty Natalie Cassidy and TV host Angellica Bell power up against athletes Jonnie Peacock and Greg Rutherford for charity.
Don't miss Jeff Goldblum & a starry cast in this epic 90s blockbuster. Two palaeontologists and a mathematician get invited to a one-of-a-kind theme park full of... dinosaurs.
Ben Shephard hosts as Countdown and Apprentice favourite Nick Hewer, comedian and presenter Zoe Lyons, and Corrie star Joe Duttine try to win 20,000 pounds for charity.

Bradley Walsh hosts as four strangers - Shajeev from Devon, Laura from Peebles, Sandra from Swansea and Sebastian from Northamptonshire - come together in the hope that they can take on a Chaser as a team and leave with thousands of pounds.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Robert feels he only has one option. Jacob is relieved. Kyle goes missing.
Summer quizzes Theo about Billy's final moments, Christina attempts to stop George from selling his business, and Roy's presence is undetected as the cafe goes up in smoke.
The stabbing of a teenager on a council estate stirs up old demons for Grace, and Branson’s investigation into a masked armed robbery leads to tensions in CID.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
Miki Anderson returns to Savage River after ten years in prison to try and start afresh, but a new crime rocks the town again and people can't help but be suspicious.
The town prepares for Savage River's annual celebration, but Hugh's disappearance has Colleen worried and Miki hoping that she doesn't become the prime suspect.
Teleshopping.
Documentary. Forensic scientist Dr Angela Gallop and forensic pathologist Dr Dick Shephard reinvestigate two murder-suicides in the 1990s that could have been double murders.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Documentary series. The family celebrate the end of winter by hosting their very first farmers market, with people buying products from local artisan makers and producers.
News, current affairs and lively debate.
Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.
The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Stephen Mulhern hosts as Mark Bonnar, Alexandra Burke and Claire Sweeney attempt to win a £50,000 jackpot for their chosen charity in this celebrity special.

David and his dealers pitch up in Stoke on Trent, where Tim Hogarth falls for an art nouveau mirror and Fay Rutter meets some familiar piggy banks. Plus, Stewart Hofgartner breaks out the big notes for a rare gold watch.
Will the Banker be victorious as another hopeful contestant opens the iconic red boxes in a bid to take home a huge cash prize. Stephen Mulhern hosts.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.
Bradley Walsh guides four people who have never met before - Josh from St Neots, Ann originally from Reading, Fergus from Glasgow and Sarah from Ipswich - as they take on a Chaser.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
A Party Election Broadcast on behalf of Reform UK.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programmes.show_name: How To Clean Up For Cash
programmes.show_description: Josie and the team embark on their first secret mission: helping Mel box up and value her husband Paul's lifetime of collections, ready to flog the lot.
Cain tries to convince Moira. New evidence is found. Sarah tries to comfort Cain.
Todd pacifies Theo while plotting his escape, Debbie learns that Carl offered Summer a bribe, Lisa confronts Kit with Mal's accusation, and Eva tries to reunite her family.
The series continues with two new campmates. Discover if the latest celebrities fit into camp or cause drama, plus big opinions lead to dramatic conclusions.
ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.

programmes.show_name: The Thief, His Wife and the...
programmes.show_description: ...Canoe: The Real Story. A documentary about John Darwin, who faked his own death in a canoeing accident off the coast of Hartlepool.
